query: SELECT id, batchNo, poNumber, vendorName, productName, createdAt, updatedAt FROM products WHERE batchNo IN ('FLOW-STOCK-BATCH-1779024145508', 'MANUAL-NEXT-1779024163008-01', 'RESTORE-BATCH-1779024197350') ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
